raw_consumer_statement:
Last fall XXXX, I purchased a round-trip international air ticket on XXXX XXXX XXXX The purchase was made through XXXX, an online travel agency. The ticket was for travel in XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX. I paid in full for the round-trip ticket ( some {$1900.00} ) using my Barclays personal credit card. 

While the outbound portion of the ticket ( XXXX - XXXX - XXXX ) was accepted by XXXX XXXX, the inbound ( XXXX - XXXX - XXXX ) was not. At the XXXX XXXX at the time of my scheduled return, the airline informed me that the ticket was not a valid fare basis, and it would not be accepted. I did not understand why, but my attempt to resolve the matter proved fruitless. At that time, I reached out to XXXX. They do not have a telephone number. They can not be reached by telephone. I attempted to reach them on their website, but I received no reply of any sort. Pressured with time and literally at the airport under duress, and with a walking mobility issue making standing for long periods difficult, I was forced to correct the matter on my own. Again, no assistance from XXXX. The airline then took over the reservation from XXXX, and to correct the unrecognized ticket sold to me by XXXX, I had to pay {$1400.00} for a valid fare to travel back home. I had paid in full for a service not provided by XXXX. 

Not long after the ticket was made valide by XXXX XXXX, I received an email from XXXX notifying me that my reservation had been taken over. I replied to them the mess they had caused me and to get in touch with me to explain the invalid fare ticket. XXXX never replied. 

I returned home and began an active attempt to resolve the issue with XXXX. To date, they have not been cooperative. They will not explain what happened or address why the paid ticket was not honored. 

I also opened up a dispute with Barclays. They have refused to cooperate. Even though I have provided them with documentation, they claim they don't have it. They have given me for months the run around. They insist that I needed to reach out to XXXX at the time of the problem, which I did. They won't believe me. My documentation supports me. They will also not honor my consumer right to dispute a charge for a service paid in full but not rendered. And they insist, wrongly, that I have no right to dispute a charge in full when half the service was rendered. I have told them multiple times that I only established the dispute for the portion of the service not rendered. This is for the return portion of the air ticket. Barclays has bullied me, not listened, not been reasonable, and refused to assist fairly. As a consumer, I protest. Hence this complaint.
